docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-24-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-24-2008. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. BOTH EXHIBTS RETAINED. BY COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: FANNY RAYRAY. NOT REPORTED (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAHN, CAROLYN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STELLAR MANAGEMENT CORP. $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,005.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO CORRECT THE NAMED DEFENDANT TO STELLAR MANAGEMENT CORP. THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS AN AWARD OF DAMAGES FOR DIMISHED SERVICES DURING THE TENANCY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT STELLAR MANAGEMENT CORP.
DECLARATION:NO AUTHORIZATION PAPERS, BUT CLAIMED ON DECLARATION AS AUTHORIZED(PARK MERCED VILLAS).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CAHN, CAROLYN AS TO DEFENDANT STELLAR MANAGEMENT CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-24-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-27-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT STELLAR MANAGEMENT CORP.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT STELLAR MANAGEMENT CORP. ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-24-2008 - JUDGMENT. CLERK - BETH WILBER
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF CAHN, CAROLYN
